chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6532 of 2021 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ Fresh Case: 1. For order on Misc. No.27922/2021 (Urgent/App) 2. For order on office objection No.04, 18 & 26 3. For order on Misc. No.27532/2021 (Exemption/App) 4. For hearing of main case. ---- 08.11.2021 Mr. Noor Muhammad Khaskheli, Advocate for the petitioner. ---- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. The petitioner has impugned his transfer letter simply on the ground that the respondent No.2 has some personal disputes with him. On the face of it, the petition is found to misconceived and not maintainable as firstly transfer posting comes under the definition of terms of service, which cannot be assailed in a writ petition. Moreover the reason for not joining the duty that the petitioner has been transferred since he has some enmity with the respondent No.2 is also found to be wholly misconceived. The petition, therefore, stands dismissed in limine alongwith the listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE
